name: Intentional Decay
description: This model gains the following ability:

granted_abilities.name: Poor Design
granted_abilities.text: When this model declares an attack action, increase this card's breaking down bar by one. When this model ends its activation, it may drain any number of (soulstone) to lower this power bar by one for each (soulstone) drained. Then, if the bar is full, this model is killed.

extraction_notes: Card shows a Breaking Down bar with 3 segments numbered 1, 2, 3
The ability references draining soulstones to manage the breaking down bar
This is an upgrade card type, though no specific upgrade type designation is shown
